name: memoryai-vsx
description: One brain. Every AI you use. Forever. Shared long-term memory for Claude, Cursor, AI assistant, and any IDE that follows.

memoryai.endpoint.description: MemoryAI API endpoint. Use http://localhost:8420 for self-hosted.

memoryai.compactMode.description: How the context-guard picks its compact/critical triggers. auto = detect the model's window from 'memoryai.model' and pick the trigger automatically (≤200K window → 95%, >200K → 30%). manual = use the exact token counts you set in 'memoryai.compactAtTokens' and 'memoryai.criticalAtTokens'.
enumDescriptions: Auto-detect from the model name and pick the trigger automatically.
Use the exact compact/critical token counts you set below.

memoryai.model.description: Auto mode only. Your model name so MemoryAI auto-detects its context window and picks the right compact trigger (≤200K window → 95%, >200K → 30%). Examples: claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-8[1m], gemini-1.5-pro. Leave blank to use the 200K default.

memoryai.compactAtTokens.description: Manual mode only. Token count at which the guard starts warning (soft compact). Example: on a 1M-window model set 150000. Must be lower than criticalAtTokens. 0 = let the server decide.

memoryai.criticalAtTokens.description: Manual mode only. Token count at which the guard forces a compact (hard ceiling). Example: on a 1M-window model set 200000 (or 600000). Must be higher than compactAtTokens. 0 = let the server decide.

memoryai.privateMode.description: Local-only mode for NDA / regulated data. Reserved for a future release.

memoryai.statusBar.description: Status-bar display format. full = brain size + monthly activity + savings (recommended). savings = $ saved today only. tokens = brain volume only. compact = monthly activity only. off = hide.
enumDescriptions: Brain volume — total memories and storage.
This month's activity — stores and recalls.
